manifest.audit_scope: Read-only validation and ablation audit; production state-space results are not modified.

R_low.description: Low observation-noise scenario, not a RadonEye calibration claim.

manifest.interval_semantics: Latent-state intervals exclude R; future-observation predictive intervals include R.
manifest.guardrail: No ACH, physical ventilation, beta, lambda_v, C_bm, C_out or exhalation-rate estimation.

scientific_decision.question: Does sequential updating improve open-loop transition?
Does S.I.R.E.M.-informed transition improve generic local-level Kalman?
Are future-observation intervals separated from latent-state intervals?
scientific_decision.evidence: Audit reports both latent_state and future_observation coverage; future-observation variance adds R.

scientific_decision.question: Is rapid-removal model stable enough for strong paper claim?
scientific_decision.evidence: Rapid-removal training samples are small and boundary stability is reported separately.
